fields.name: number
fields.description: the flight number as assigned by the carrier

fields.name: suffix
fields.description: the flight number suffix as assigned by the carrier

fields.name: class
fields.description: reservation booking designator (RBD) of the carrier

fields.name: cabin
fields.description: booking cabin / class of service of the carrier

fields.name: duration
fields.description: stop duration in [ISO8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) PnYnMnDTnHnMnS format, e.g. PT2H10M

fields.name: stops
fields.description: information regarding the different stops composing the flight segment. E.g. technical stop, change of gauge...
